dual-interface-log-issue.description: Supports both CLI flag interface and stdin JSON interface for logging review issues

backward-compatible.description: Existing stdin JSON format continues to work unchanged

cli-flags-work.description: CLI flag interface (--type, --severity, --title, --description) correctly creates and logs issues

auto-generated-fields.description: id and createdAt are auto-generated when using CLI flags

definition.scope: Aligns the review log-issue CLI with its documentation by supporting both CLI flags and stdin JSON input, and updates all skill docs to reflect correct usage patterns.

tasks.description: Update review.cjs log-issue handler to parse CLI flags as alternative to stdin JSON
tasks.acceptance: Both CLI flags and stdin JSON produce identical logged issues

tasks.description: Auto-generate id and createdAt when using CLI flags
tasks.acceptance: CLI flag usage produces valid issue objects with generated fields

tasks.description: Update skill docs to show both interfaces
tasks.acceptance: Skill docs accurately reflect both stdin JSON and CLI flag usage

acceptance: Both CLI flag and stdin JSON interfaces work correctly
Backward compatibility: existing stdin JSON callers unaffected
Updated documentation in all referencing skills
